heading: Revocation of probation
label: 5042 Revocation of probation
text: Any juvenile probationer shall be accorded notice and a hearing with counsel before his probation can be revoked.
notes: Amendments1984— struck out “parole or” before “probation” in section catchline and text, and struck out “parolee or” before “probationer” in text.Pub. L. 98–473
